description: Premium speech-to-text with speaker diarization, summarization, sentiment, topic detection, and PII redaction. LeMUR LLM over transcripts.

transcribe-submit.notes: Submit audio URL for async transcription. Returns transcript ID — poll /v2/transcript/{id}. Supports `audio_url` or pre-uploaded file. Add `speaker_labels:true` for diarization, `summarization:true` for summary, `sentiment_analysis:true` for sentiment.

transcribe-get.notes: Poll transcript status (queued/processing/completed/error). Free — only the submission charges.

lemur-summary.notes: Run LeMUR LLM to generate a summary across one or more transcripts.

lemur-qa.notes: Ask structured questions over transcripts; returns JSON answers.

upload.notes: Upload audio file directly (returns upload_url to feed into /v2/transcript). Free — only transcription charges.
